---
title: "SCRATCH-TCR: GLIPH2 Analysis"
author: "SCRATCH-TCR"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    df-print: paged
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  # ======================================================
  # Inputs
  # ======================================================
  seurat_rds: "data/seurat_with_CoNGA.rds"
  outdir: "GLIPH2_Report"
  auto_install_immgliph: false

  tcr_export_cells_file: "tcr_export_cells_with_embedding.tsv"
  gliph_clusters_file: ""
  gliph_motifs_file: ""
  gliph_summary_file: ""

  # ======================================================
  # Offline GLIPH2 reference handling
  # ======================================================
  gliph_ref_mode: "local_bundle"
  refdb_beta: "human_v2.0_CD48"
  gliph_reference_bundle: "reference_list.RData"

  # ======================================================
  # Seurat metadata mapping
  # ======================================================
  sample_col: "orig.ident"
  patient_col: "patient_id"
  condition_col: "condition"
  batch_col: "batch"
  label_col: "predicted_labels"
  timepoint_col: "timepoint"
  clone_id_md_col: "clone_id"
  clone_size_col: "clone_size"
  paired_tcr_col: "paired_tcr"
  has_tcr_col: "has_tcr"
  tcri_score_col: "tcri_score"
  tcri_group_col: "tcri_group"
  conga_cluster_col: "conga_gex_cluster"
  conga_score_col: "conga_score"

  reduction_use: "umap"
  make_umap_if_missing: true
  umap_dims_max: 30
  umap_nfeatures: 3000
  raster_large_umap: true

  clone_match_mode: "auto"
  derive_clone_key_from_CTaa: true
  min_cells_per_group: 10
  min_cluster_size_plot: 3
  top_n_clusters: 20
  top_n_motifs: 20
  report_label: "GLIPH2 Analysis"

  # CANDIDATE LISTS
  label_candidates: !expr 'c("predicted.celltype.l2","predicted.celltype.l1","azimuth_labels","celltypist","celltypist_label","majority_voting","scType","sctype","sctype_label","celltype","CellType","annot","Annotation","seurat_clusters")'
  sample_candidates: !expr 'c("META_SAMPLE","orig.ident","sample","sample_id","Sample","SampleID")'
  patient_candidates: !expr 'c("META_PATIENT","patient_id","patient","Patient","subject","donor","case_id")'
  condition_candidates: !expr 'c("META_TIMECOND","condition","Condition","group","Group","status","timepoint","Timepoint")'
  timepoint_candidates: !expr 'c("timepoint","Timepoint","visit","Visit","day","Day","META_TIMECOND")'
  batch_candidates: !expr 'c("META_BATCH","batch","Batch","library","Library","run","Run","lane","Lane")'
  clone_id_md_candidates: !expr 'c("clone_id","CTaa","clonotype","clone")'
  clone_size_candidates: !expr 'c("clone_size","CloneSize","clone_n")'
  paired_tcr_candidates: !expr 'c("paired_tcr","paired","is_paired")'
  has_tcr_candidates: !expr 'c("has_tcr","hasTCR","tcr_positive")'
  tcri_score_candidates: !expr 'c("tcri_score","score","TCRi","tcri","invertibility_score")'
  tcri_group_candidates: !expr 'c("tcri_group","group","class","label","TCRi_group")'
  conga_cluster_candidates_md: !expr 'c("conga_gex_cluster","conga_cluster","cluster","graph_cluster")'
  conga_score_candidates_md: !expr 'c("conga_score","score","graph_score")'

  # GLIPH2 Run Controls
  subset_to_tcr_positive: true
  subset_to_paired_tcr: true
  use_only_beta_defined: true
  min_cells_total: 100
  min_unique_clones: 25
  method: "gliph2"
  sim_depth: 500
  n_cores: 2
  hla_file: ""
  hla_patient_col: "patient"
  hla_allele_sep: ","
  label_clusters: true
  top_n_states_heatmap: 30
  show_cluster_umap: true
  show_cluster_size_barplot: true
  show_motif_barplot: true
  show_cluster_annotation_heatmap: true
  show_cluster_sample_heatmap: true
  show_gliph_by_annotation: true
  show_gliph_by_sample: true
  show_gliph_by_condition: true
  show_gliph_by_patient: true
  show_tcri_vs_gliph: true
  show_conga_vs_gliph: true
  show_summary_tables: true
  data_dir: "data"
  tables_dir: "tables"
  figures_dir: "figures"
  save_tables: true
  save_figures: true
  save_updated_seurat: true
  figure_format: "png"
  figure_width: 10
  figure_height: 7
  figure_dpi: 300
  base_size: 12
---

# =========================================================
# - starts from "seurat_with_CoNGA.rds"
# - derives the GLIPH2 input clonotype table from Seurat
# - runs **GLIPH2** via "immGLIPH::runGLIPH(method = "gliph2")"
# - saves the raw GLIPH2 result object
# - extracts cluster, motif, and cluster-property outputs
# - merges those back into Seurat
# - saves "seurat_with_GLIPH2.rds"
# - then performs the downstream summaries and plots
# =========================================================



# setup
```{r}
#| label: setup
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(SeuratObject)
  library(data.table)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(forcats)
  library(scales)
  library(glue)
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(circlize)
  library(patchwork)
  library(immGLIPH)
  library(BiocFileCache)
  library(grid)
})

options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

dir.create(params$outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path(params$outdir, params$data_dir), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path(params$outdir, params$tables_dir), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path(params$outdir, params$figures_dir), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a) && length(a) > 0 && !all(is.na(a))) a else b

theme_scratch_pub <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 2, hjust = 0),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_size, hjust = 0),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey90"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey80"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.key = element_blank(),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = base_size - 2, color = "grey40")
    )
}

save_plot_safe <- function(plot_obj, filename,
                           width = params$figure_width,
                           height = params$figure_height,
                           dpi = params$figure_dpi) {
  if (!isTRUE(params$save_figures)) return(invisible(NULL))
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(params$outdir, params$figures_dir, filename),
    plot = plot_obj,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    dpi = dpi,
    bg = "white",
    limitsize = FALSE
  )
}

save_table_safe <- function(df, filename) {
  if (!isTRUE(params$save_tables)) return(invisible(NULL))
  fwrite(df, file.path(params$outdir, params$tables_dir, filename), sep = "\t")
}

save_rds_safe <- function(obj, filename) {
  if (!isTRUE(params$save_updated_seurat)) return(invisible(NULL))
  saveRDS(obj, file.path(params$outdir, params$data_dir, filename))
}

require_file <- function(path, msg = NULL) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop(msg %||% paste("Missing required file:", path))
  path
}

# first_existing_col <- function(df, preferred, candidates = character()) {
#   if (!is.null(preferred) && preferred != "" && preferred %in% colnames(df)) return(preferred)
#   hits <- intersect(candidates, colnames(df))
#   if (length(hits) > 0) return(hits[[1]])
#   NULL
# }

safe_make_umap <- function(seu, reduction_name = "umap", dims = 1:30, nfeatures = 3000, seed = 1234) {
  if ("RNA" %in% names(seu@assays)) DefaultAssay(seu) <- "RNA"
  npcs <- min(max(dims), max(2, ncol(seu) - 1), 50)
  nf <- min(nfeatures, nrow(seu))

  if (!"pca" %in% Reductions(seu)) {
    seu <- FindVariableFeatures(seu, nfeatures = nf, verbose = FALSE)
    seu <- ScaleData(seu, verbose = FALSE)
    seu <- RunPCA(seu, npcs = npcs, verbose = FALSE)
  }

  use_dims <- dims[dims <= npcs]
  if (length(use_dims) < 2) use_dims <- 1:min(10, npcs)

  seu <- FindNeighbors(seu, dims = use_dims, verbose = FALSE)
  seu <- RunUMAP(seu, dims = use_dims, reduction.name = reduction_name, verbose = FALSE)
  seu
}

# extract_cdr3b_from_CTaa <- function(x) {
#   x <- as.character(x)
#   out <- rep(NA_character_, length(x))
#   has_b <- grepl("\\|B:", x)
#   out[has_b] <- sub("^.*\\|B:", "", x[has_b])
#   only_b <- grepl("^B:", x)
#   out[only_b] <- sub("^B:", "", x[only_b])
#   out
# }

# Standardize the helper function to extract the Beta chain
extract_cdr3b_from_CTaa <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  # Standard SCRATCH format is A:SEQ|B:SEQ. 
  # We strip everything before and including '|B:'
  out <- sub("^.*\\|B:", "", x)
  # Fallback for Beta-only chains (B:SEQ)
  out <- sub("^B:", "", out)
  # Final clean up to remove any trailing alpha info if format varies
  out <- sub("\\|.*$", "", out)
  return(out)
}

# Helper for safe division
safe_percent <- function(x, denom) ifelse(denom > 0, x / denom, NA_real_)

sanitize_param_string <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) return(NULL)
  trimws(gsub("\\u00A0", " ", as.character(x)))
}

# normalize_colnames <- function(df) {
#   colnames(df) <- trimws(gsub("\\u00A0", " ", colnames(df)))
#   df
# }
# 
# first_existing_col <- function(df, preferred, candidates = character()) {
#   df <- normalize_colnames(df)
#   preferred <- sanitize_param_string(preferred)
#   candidates <- trimws(gsub("\\u00A0", " ", as.character(candidates)))
# 
#   if (!is.null(preferred) && preferred != "" && preferred %in% colnames(df)) return(preferred)
# 
#   hits <- intersect(candidates, colnames(df))
#   if (length(hits) > 0) return(hits[[1]])
# 
#   NULL
# }

load_gliph_reference_from_bundle <- function(bundle_file, ref_name) {
  bundle_file <- sanitize_param_string(bundle_file)
  ref_name <- sanitize_param_string(ref_name)

  if (is.null(bundle_file) || bundle_file == "" || !file.exists(bundle_file)) {
    stop("Local GLIPH2 reference bundle not found: ", bundle_file)
  }

  env <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())
  load(bundle_file, envir = env)

  if (!exists("reference_list", envir = env, inherits = FALSE)) {
    stop("reference_list object not found in GLIPH2 bundle: ", bundle_file)
  }

  refs <- get("reference_list", envir = env, inherits = FALSE)

  if (!ref_name %in% names(refs)) {
    stop(
      "Requested GLIPH2 reference '", ref_name,
      "' not found in local bundle. Available: ",
      paste(names(refs), collapse = ", ")
    )
  }

  ref_obj <- refs[[ref_name]]

  if (!is.list(ref_obj) || !"refseqs" %in% names(ref_obj) || !is.data.frame(ref_obj$refseqs)) {
    stop(
      "Reference object for '", ref_name,
      "' does not contain a valid refseqs data.frame."
    )
  }

  ref_obj$refseqs
}


sanitize_param_string <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) return(NULL)
  trimws(gsub("\\u00A0", " ", as.character(x)))
}

normalize_colnames <- function(df) {
  colnames(df) <- trimws(gsub("\\u00A0", " ", colnames(df)))
  df
}

first_existing_col <- function(df, preferred, candidates = character()) {
  df <- normalize_colnames(df)
  preferred <- sanitize_param_string(preferred)
  candidates <- trimws(gsub("\\u00A0", " ", as.character(candidates)))

  if (!is.null(preferred) && preferred != "" && preferred %in% colnames(df)) return(preferred)
  hits <- intersect(candidates, colnames(df))
  if (length(hits) > 0) return(hits[[1]])
  NULL
}

choose_col <- function(df, primary = NULL, fallback = NULL) {
  nm <- colnames(df)
  if (!is.null(primary) && primary != "" && primary %in% nm) return(primary)
  if (!is.null(fallback) && fallback != "" && fallback %in% nm) return(fallback)
  NULL
}


```



# read-inputs
```{r}
#| label: read-inputs
require_file(params$seurat_rds, sprintf("Seurat RDS not found: %s", params$seurat_rds))
seu <- readRDS(params$seurat_rds)

print(colnames(seu@meta.data))


```


# resolved columns
```{r}
#| label: resolve-columns
# md <- seu@meta.data
md <- normalize_colnames(seu@meta.data)
seu@meta.data <- md

label_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$label_col, params$label_candidates)
sample_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$sample_col, params$sample_candidates)
patient_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$patient_col, params$patient_candidates)
condition_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$condition_col, params$condition_candidates)
timepoint_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$timepoint_col, params$timepoint_candidates)
batch_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$batch_col, params$batch_candidates)
clone_id_md_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$clone_id_md_col, params$clone_id_md_candidates)
clone_size_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$clone_size_col, params$clone_size_candidates)
paired_tcr_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$paired_tcr_col, params$paired_tcr_candidates)
has_tcr_col <- first_existing_col(md, params$has_tcr_col, params$has_tcr_candidates)
tcri_score_col_md <- first_existing_col(md, params$tcri_score_col, params$tcri_score_candidates)
tcri_group_col_md <- first_existing_col(md, params$tcri_group_col, params$tcri_group_candidates)
conga_cluster_col_md <- first_existing_col(md, params$conga_cluster_col, params$conga_cluster_candidates_md)
conga_score_col_md <- first_existing_col(md, params$conga_score_col, params$conga_score_candidates_md)

if (is.null(label_col)) stop("Could not resolve an annotation label column in Seurat metadata.")
if (is.null(sample_col)) stop("Could not resolve sample column in Seurat metadata.")
if (is.null(patient_col)) stop("Could not resolve patient column in Seurat metadata.")
if (is.null(condition_col)) stop("Could not resolve condition column in Seurat metadata.")
if (is.null(timepoint_col)) stop("Could not resolve timepoint column in Seurat metadata.")
if (is.null(clone_id_md_col)) stop("Could not resolve a clone ID column in Seurat metadata.")
if (is.null(clone_size_col)) stop("Could not resolve a clone size column in Seurat metadata.")
if (is.null(has_tcr_col)) stop("Could not resolve a has_tcr column in Seurat metadata.")
if (is.null(paired_tcr_col)) stop("Could not resolve a paired_tcr column in Seurat metadata.")

if (!"META_SAMPLE" %in% colnames(seu@meta.data) && !is.null(sample_col)) {
  seu$META_SAMPLE <- as.character(seu@meta.data[[sample_col]])
}
if (!"META_PATIENT" %in% colnames(seu@meta.data) && !is.null(patient_col)) {
  seu$META_PATIENT <- as.character(seu@meta.data[[patient_col]])
}
if (!"META_TIMECOND" %in% colnames(seu@meta.data) && !is.null(condition_col)) {
  seu$META_TIMECOND <- as.character(seu@meta.data[[condition_col]])
}
if (!"META_TIMEPOINT" %in% colnames(seu@meta.data) && !is.null(timepoint_col)) {
  seu$META_TIMEPOINT <- as.character(seu@meta.data[[timepoint_col]])
}
if (!"META_BATCH" %in% colnames(seu@meta.data) && !is.null(batch_col)) {
  seu$META_BATCH <- as.character(seu@meta.data[[batch_col]])
}

print(list(
  resolved_label_col = label_col,
  resolved_sample_col = sample_col,
  resolved_patient_col = patient_col,
  resolved_condition_col = condition_col,
  resolved_timepoint_col = timepoint_col,
  resolved_batch_col = batch_col,
  resolved_tcri_score_col = tcri_score_col_md,
  resolved_conga_score_col = conga_score_col_md
))

```



# subset-for-gliph2
```{r}
#| label: subset-for-gliph2
seu_gliph <- seu

if (isTRUE(params$subset_to_tcr_positive)) {
  keep <- !is.na(seu_gliph@meta.data[[has_tcr_col]]) & as.logical(seu_gliph@meta.data[[has_tcr_col]])
  seu_gliph <- subset(seu_gliph, cells = rownames(seu_gliph@meta.data)[keep])
}

if (isTRUE(params$subset_to_paired_tcr)) {
  keep <- !is.na(seu_gliph@meta.data[[paired_tcr_col]]) & as.logical(seu_gliph@meta.data[[paired_tcr_col]])
  seu_gliph <- subset(seu_gliph, cells = rownames(seu_gliph@meta.data)[keep])
}

if (ncol(seu_gliph) < params$min_cells_total) {
  stop("Too few cells remain for GLIPH2 analysis after filtering: ", ncol(seu_gliph))
}
```

# build-gliph-input
```{r}
#| label: build-gliph-input
seu_md <- seu_gliph@meta.data %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("cell_id") %>%
  mutate(
    clone_id_md = as.character(.data[[clone_id_md_col]]),
    CDR3b = if (isTRUE(params$derive_clone_key_from_CTaa)) extract_cdr3b_from_CTaa(clone_id_md) else clone_id_md,
    patient = if (!is.null(patient_col)) as.character(.data[[patient_col]]) else NA_character_,
    counts = if (!is.null(clone_size_col)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[clone_size_col]])) else 1
  )

gliph_input <- seu_md %>%
  filter(!is.na(CDR3b), CDR3b != "") %>%
  distinct(CDR3b, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  transmute(
    CDR3b = CDR3b,
    patient = patient,
    counts = ifelse(is.na(counts), 1, pmax(1, round(counts)))
  )

if (nrow(gliph_input) < params$min_unique_clones) {
  stop("Too few unique beta-chain clonotypes for GLIPH2: ", nrow(gliph_input))
}

save_table_safe(gliph_input, "gliph2_input.tsv")
```

# optional-hla
```{r}
#| label: optional-hla
hla_tbl <- NULL
if (!is.null(params$hla_file) && params$hla_file != "") {
  require_file(params$hla_file, sprintf("HLA file not found: %s", params$hla_file))
  hla_tbl <- fread(params$hla_file) %>% as.data.frame()
}
```

# run-gliph2
```{r}
#| label: run-gliph2

resolved_refdb <- if (sanitize_param_string(params$gliph_ref_mode) == "local_bundle") {
  load_gliph_reference_from_bundle(
    bundle_file = params$gliph_reference_bundle,
    ref_name = params$refdb_beta
  )
} else {
  sanitize_param_string(params$refdb_beta)
}

run_args <- list(
  cdr3_sequences = gliph_input,
  method = params$method,
  refdb_beta = resolved_refdb,
  sim_depth = as.integer(params$sim_depth),
  n_cores = as.integer(params$n_cores),
  result_folder = file.path(params$outdir, params$data_dir)
)

if (!is.null(hla_tbl)) {
  run_args$hla_table <- hla_tbl
}

gliph_res <- do.call(immGLIPH::runGLIPH, run_args)
saveRDS(gliph_res, file.path(params$outdir, params$data_dir, "gliph2_result_object.rds"))


# run_args <- list(
#   cdr3_sequences = gliph_input,
#   method = params$method,
#   refdb_beta = params$refdb_beta,
#   sim_depth = as.integer(params$sim_depth),
#   n_cores = as.integer(params$n_cores),
#   result_folder = file.path(params$outdir, params$data_dir)
# )
# 
# if (!is.null(hla_tbl)) {
#   run_args$hla_table <- hla_tbl
# }
# 
# gliph_res <- do.call(immGLIPH::runGLIPH, run_args)
# saveRDS(gliph_res, file.path(params$outdir, params$data_dir, "gliph2_result_object.rds"))
```

# extract-gliph2-results
```{r}
#| label: extract-gliph2-results
cluster_properties <- gliph_res$cluster_properties %||% data.frame()
motif_tbl <- gliph_res$motif_enrichment$selected_motifs %||% data.frame()
cluster_members <- gliph_res$cluster_list %||% list()

if (nrow(cluster_properties) == 0 && length(cluster_members) == 0) {
  stop("GLIPH2 returned no cluster properties and no cluster membership list.")
}

# flatten cluster membership list
member_tbl <- NULL
if (length(cluster_members) > 0) {
  member_tbl <- rbindlist(
    lapply(names(cluster_members), function(nm) {
      df <- as.data.frame(cluster_members[[nm]])
      df$gliph_cluster <- nm
      df
    }),
    fill = TRUE
  ) %>% as.data.frame()
}

if (is.null(member_tbl) || nrow(member_tbl) == 0) {
  stop("Could not extract GLIPH2 cluster membership details.")
}

# resolve columns from immGLIPH output
member_cols <- colnames(member_tbl)
cdr3b_member_col <- if ("CDR3b" %in% member_cols) "CDR3b" else if ("cdr3b" %in% member_cols) "cdr3b" else member_cols[1]
pattern_col <- if ("pattern" %in% member_cols) "pattern" else if ("motif" %in% member_cols) "motif" else NULL
group_col <- if ("group" %in% member_cols) "group" else if ("specificity_group" %in% member_cols) "specificity_group" else NULL

prop_cols <- colnames(cluster_properties)
prop_cluster_col <- if ("cluster_tag" %in% prop_cols) "cluster_tag" else if ("gliph_cluster" %in% prop_cols) "gliph_cluster" else NULL
prop_score_col <- if ("score" %in% prop_cols) "score" else NULL
prop_pvalue_col <- if ("p_value" %in% prop_cols) "p_value" else if ("pvalue" %in% prop_cols) "pvalue" else NULL
prop_qvalue_col <- if ("q_value" %in% prop_cols) "q_value" else if ("qvalue" %in% prop_cols) "qvalue" else NULL
prop_size_col <- if ("members" %in% prop_cols) "members" else if ("cluster_size" %in% prop_cols) "cluster_size" else NULL

gliph_tbl_std <- member_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    gliph_clone_key = as.character(.data[[cdr3b_member_col]]),
    gliph_cluster = as.character(gliph_cluster),
    gliph_group = if (!is.null(group_col)) as.character(.data[[group_col]]) else NA_character_,
    gliph_pattern = if (!is.null(pattern_col)) as.character(.data[[pattern_col]]) else NA_character_
  )

expected_gliph_cols <- c(
  "gliph_clone_key",
  "gliph_cluster",
  "gliph_group",
  "gliph_pattern",
  "gliph_motif",
  "gliph_score",
  "gliph_pvalue",
  "gliph_qvalue",
  "gliph_cluster_size"
)

for (cc in expected_gliph_cols) {
  if (!cc %in% colnames(gliph_tbl_std)) {
    if (cc %in% c("gliph_score", "gliph_pvalue", "gliph_qvalue", "gliph_cluster_size")) {
      gliph_tbl_std[[cc]] <- NA_real_
    } else {
      gliph_tbl_std[[cc]] <- NA_character_
    }
  }
}

if (!is.null(prop_cluster_col)) {
  cluster_properties2 <- cluster_properties %>%
    mutate(
      gliph_cluster = as.character(.data[[prop_cluster_col]]),
      gliph_score = if (!is.null(prop_score_col)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[prop_score_col]])) else NA_real_,
      gliph_pvalue = if (!is.null(prop_pvalue_col)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[prop_pvalue_col]])) else NA_real_,
      gliph_qvalue = if (!is.null(prop_qvalue_col)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[prop_qvalue_col]])) else NA_real_,
      gliph_cluster_size = if (!is.null(prop_size_col)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[prop_size_col]])) else NA_real_
    ) %>%
    select(gliph_cluster, gliph_score, gliph_pvalue, gliph_qvalue, gliph_cluster_size)
  gliph_tbl_std <- gliph_tbl_std %>%
    left_join(cluster_properties2, by = "gliph_cluster")
} else {
  gliph_tbl_std$gliph_score <- NA_real_
  gliph_tbl_std$gliph_pvalue <- NA_real_
  gliph_tbl_std$gliph_qvalue <- NA_real_
  gliph_tbl_std$gliph_cluster_size <- NA_real_
}

if (nrow(motif_tbl) > 0) {
  motif_cols <- colnames(motif_tbl)
  motif_key_col <- if ("motif" %in% motif_cols) "motif" else motif_cols[1]
  motif_score_col <- if ("p_value" %in% motif_cols) "p_value" else if ("pvalue" %in% motif_cols) "pvalue" else NULL

  motif_tbl2 <- motif_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      gliph_motif = as.character(.data[[motif_key_col]]),
      motif_score_aux = if (!is.null(motif_score_col)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[motif_score_col]])) else NA_real_
    ) %>%
    select(gliph_motif) %>%
    distinct()

  if ("gliph_pattern" %in% colnames(gliph_tbl_std)) {
    gliph_tbl_std <- gliph_tbl_std %>%
      left_join(
        motif_tbl2,
        by = c("gliph_pattern" = "gliph_motif")
      )
  }

  if (!"gliph_motif" %in% colnames(gliph_tbl_std)) {
    gliph_tbl_std$gliph_motif <- NA_character_
  }
} else {
  gliph_tbl_std$gliph_motif <- NA_character_
}

save_table_safe(gliph_tbl_std, "gliph2_clusters.tsv")
if (nrow(cluster_properties) > 0) save_table_safe(cluster_properties, "gliph2_cluster_properties.tsv")
if (nrow(motif_tbl) > 0) save_table_safe(motif_tbl, "gliph2_motifs.tsv")
```

# Merge GLIPH2 annotations back into Seurat
```{r}
#| label: merge-gliph-into-seurat
seu_md_full <- seu@meta.data %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("cell_id") %>%
  mutate(
    clone_id_md = as.character(.data[[clone_id_md_col]]),
    clone_match_key_cdr3b = if (isTRUE(params$derive_clone_key_from_CTaa)) extract_cdr3b_from_CTaa(clone_id_md) else clone_id_md
  )

merge_df <- seu_md_full %>%
  left_join(
    gliph_tbl_std %>%
      select(gliph_clone_key, gliph_cluster, gliph_group, gliph_pattern, gliph_motif, gliph_score, gliph_pvalue, gliph_qvalue, gliph_cluster_size) %>%
      distinct(gliph_clone_key, .keep_all = TRUE),
    by = c("clone_match_key_cdr3b" = "gliph_clone_key")
  )

rownames(merge_df) <- merge_df$cell_id
merge_df$cell_id <- NULL
seu@meta.data <- as.data.frame(merge_df)

save_rds_safe(seu, "seurat_with_GLIPH2.rds")
```

# Ensure embedding
```{r}
#| label: ensure-embedding
reduction_to_use <- params$reduction_use
if (!(reduction_to_use %in% names(seu@reductions)) && isTRUE(params$make_umap_if_missing)) {
  seu <- safe_make_umap(
    seu,
    reduction_name = params$reduction_use,
    dims = 1:params$umap_dims_max,
    nfeatures = params$umap_nfeatures
  )
}
if (!(reduction_to_use %in% names(seu@reductions))) {
  reduction_to_use <- if ("umap" %in% names(seu@reductions)) "umap" else if ("tsne" %in% names(seu@reductions)) "tsne" else if ("pca" %in% names(seu@reductions)) "pca" else stop("No usable embedding found.")
}
```

# Export integrated table
```{r}
#| label: build-export

embed_df <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(seu, reduction_to_use)) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("cell_id")

sample_col_export    <- choose_col(seu@meta.data, "META_SAMPLE", sample_col)
patient_col_export   <- choose_col(seu@meta.data, "META_PATIENT", patient_col)
condition_col_export <- choose_col(seu@meta.data, "META_TIMECOND", condition_col)
timepoint_col_export <- choose_col(seu@meta.data, "META_TIMEPOINT", timepoint_col)
batch_col_export     <- choose_col(seu@meta.data, "META_BATCH", batch_col)

export_cells <- seu@meta.data %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("cell_id") %>%
  transmute(
    cell_id,
    sample = if (!is.null(sample_col_export)) as.character(.data[[sample_col_export]]) else NA_character_,
    patient = if (!is.null(patient_col_export)) as.character(.data[[patient_col_export]]) else NA_character_,
    condition = if (!is.null(condition_col_export)) as.character(.data[[condition_col_export]]) else NA_character_,
    timepoint = if (!is.null(timepoint_col_export)) as.character(.data[[timepoint_col_export]]) else NA_character_,
    batch = if (!is.null(batch_col_export)) as.character(.data[[batch_col_export]]) else NA_character_,
    annot = as.character(.data[[label_col]]),
    clone_id = as.character(.data[[clone_id_md_col]]),
    clone_size = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[clone_size_col]])),
    has_tcr = as.logical(.data[[has_tcr_col]]),
    paired_tcr = as.logical(.data[[paired_tcr_col]]),
    tcri_score = if (!is.null(tcri_score_col_md)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[tcri_score_col_md]])) else NA_real_,
    tcri_group = if (!is.null(tcri_group_col_md)) as.character(.data[[tcri_group_col_md]]) else NA_character_,
    conga_cluster = if (!is.null(conga_cluster_col_md)) as.character(.data[[conga_cluster_col_md]]) else NA_character_,
    conga_score = if (!is.null(conga_score_col_md)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[conga_score_col_md]])) else NA_real_,
    gliph_cluster = as.character(.data[["gliph_cluster"]]),
    gliph_group = as.character(.data[["gliph_group"]]),
    gliph_pattern = as.character(.data[["gliph_pattern"]]),
    gliph_motif = as.character(.data[["gliph_motif"]]),
    gliph_score = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[["gliph_score"]])),
    gliph_pvalue = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[["gliph_pvalue"]])),
    gliph_qvalue = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[["gliph_qvalue"]])),
    gliph_cluster_size = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[["gliph_cluster_size"]]))
  ) %>%
  left_join(embed_df, by = "cell_id")


save_table_safe(export_cells, "gliph2_export_cells.tsv")
```

# merge-diagnostics
```{r}
#| label: merge-diagnostics
merge_diagnostics <- tibble(
  metric = c(
    "Cells in Seurat",
    "Unique GLIPH2 input clonotypes",
    "Cells with GLIPH2 cluster",
    "Cells with GLIPH2 pattern",
    "Cells with GLIPH2 motif",
    "Fraction with GLIPH2 cluster"
  ),
  value = c(
    ncol(seu),
    nrow(gliph_input),
    sum(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_cluster)),
    sum(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_pattern)),
    sum(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_motif)),
    sprintf("%.2f%%", 100 * mean(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_cluster)))
  )
)
save_table_safe(merge_diagnostics, "gliph2_merge_diagnostics.tsv")

```

# summary tables
```{r}
#| label: summary-tables
#| results: hide

# 1. High-level Rollup Table
summary_rollup <- tibble(
  metric = c(
    "Report label", "Cells in Seurat", "Cells with GLIPH2 clusters",
    "Cells with GLIPH2 patterns", "TCR-positive cells", "Paired TCR cells",
    "Unique GLIPH2 clusters", "Unique annotations", "Unique samples"
  ),
  value = c(
    params$report_label, nrow(export_cells), sum(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_cluster)),
    sum(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_pattern)), sum(export_cells$has_tcr, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(export_cells$paired_tcr, na.rm = TRUE), length(unique(na.omit(export_cells$gliph_cluster))),
    length(unique(na.omit(export_cells$annot))), length(unique(na.omit(export_cells$sample)))
  )
)

# 2. Cluster Summary & Display Naming
# We use GLIPH_01 format to ensure proper sorting in heatmaps
cluster_summary <- export_cells %>%
  filter(!is.na(gliph_cluster)) %>%
  count(gliph_cluster, name = "n_cells") %>%
  mutate(frac = n_cells / sum(n_cells)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_cells)) %>%
  mutate(gliph_cluster_display = paste0("GLIPH_", sprintf("%02d", seq_len(n()))))

# Map labels back to the main data frame
cluster_label_map <- cluster_summary %>% dplyr::select(gliph_cluster, gliph_cluster_display)
export_cells <- export_cells %>% 
  left_join(cluster_label_map, by = "gliph_cluster")

# 3. Composition Tables (Missing Objects Fix)
cluster_annotation_tbl <- export_cells %>%
  filter(!is.na(gliph_cluster), !is.na(annot)) %>%
  count(gliph_cluster, annot, name = "n_cells")

cluster_sample_tbl <- export_cells %>%
  filter(!is.na(gliph_cluster), !is.na(sample)) %>%
  count(gliph_cluster, sample, name = "n_cells")

# 4. Motif & Annotation Specificity
motif_summary <- export_cells %>%
  filter(!is.na(gliph_motif), gliph_motif != "") %>%
  count(gliph_motif, name = "n_cells") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_cells))

annotation_gliph_summary <- export_cells %>%
  filter(!is.na(annot)) %>%
  group_by(annot) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cells = n(),
    n_gliph = sum(!is.na(gliph_cluster)),
    frac_gliph = safe_percent(n_gliph, n_cells),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(frac_gliph))

# Save TSVs for supplemental data
save_table_safe(summary_rollup, "gliph2_summary_rollup.tsv")
save_table_safe(cluster_summary, "gliph2_cluster_summary.tsv")
save_table_safe(cluster_annotation_tbl, "gliph2_cluster_annotation_composition.tsv")

```

# Report overview
```{r}
#| label: overview
kable(summary_rollup, caption = "High-level overview of GLIPH2 analysis.") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
```

# cluster-umap
```{r}
#| label: cluster-umap
#| fig-width: 18
#| fig-height: 12

if (isTRUE(params$show_cluster_umap)) {
  
  # Map labels to Seurat
  seu$gliph_display <- export_cells$gliph_cluster_display[match(colnames(seu), export_cells$cell_id)]
  cells_gliph <- colnames(seu)[!is.na(seu$gliph_display)]
  
  if (length(cells_gliph) > 0) {
    p_base <- DimPlot(
      seu, reduction = reduction_to_use, group.by = "gliph_display", 
      label = TRUE, label.size = 5, repel = TRUE, raster = isTRUE(params$raster_large_umap)
    ) + 
      scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo", na.value = "grey95") +
      labs(title = "GLIPH2 Specificity Hotspots",
           subtitle = "Contours represent structural convergence density") +
      theme_scratch_pub(params$base_size) +
      theme(legend.position = "none") # Critical fix for the viewport error

    # Add Density Contours
    coords <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(seu, reduction_to_use)[cells_gliph, ])
    colnames(coords) <- c("UMAP_1", "UMAP_2")
    
    p_final <- p_base + stat_density_2d(data = coords, aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2), color = "black", alpha = 0.3)
    
    print(p_final)
    save_plot_safe(p_final, "gliph2_advanced_umap.png", width = 18, height = 12)
  }
}

```

# Cluster size and motif summaries
```{r}
#| label: cluster-and-motif-barplots

if (isTRUE(params$show_cluster_size_barplot) && nrow(cluster_summary) > 0) {
  top_clusters <- cluster_summary %>% slice_head(n = params$top_n_clusters)

  p_cluster_bar <- top_clusters %>%
    mutate(gliph_cluster_display = fct_reorder(gliph_cluster_display, n_cells)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = gliph_cluster_display, y = n_cells)) +
    geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
    labs(
      title = "Top GLIPH2 clusters",
      x = "GLIPH2 cluster",
      y = "Cells"
    ) +
    theme_scratch_pub(params$base_size) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

  print(p_cluster_bar)
  save_plot_safe(p_cluster_bar, glue("gliph2_cluster_size_barplot.{params$figure_format}"))
}

if (isTRUE(params$show_motif_barplot) && nrow(motif_summary) > 0) {
  top_motifs <- motif_summary %>% slice_head(n = params$top_n_motifs)

  p_motif_bar <- top_motifs %>%
    mutate(gliph_motif = fct_reorder(gliph_motif, n_cells)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = gliph_motif, y = n_cells)) +
    geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
    labs(title = "Top GLIPH2 motifs", x = NULL, y = "Cells") +
    theme_scratch_pub(params$base_size)

  print(p_motif_bar)
  save_plot_safe(p_motif_bar, glue("gliph2_motif_barplot.{params$figure_format}"))
}


```

# annotation-heatmap
```{r}
#| label: annotation-heatmap
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 12

if (isTRUE(params$show_cluster_annotation_heatmap) && nrow(cluster_annotation_tbl) > 0) {
  
  # 1. Prepare Matrix
  top_cls_vec <- cluster_summary %>%
    filter(n_cells >= params$min_cluster_size_plot) %>%
    slice_head(n = params$top_n_clusters) %>%
    pull(gliph_cluster)

  mat_df <- cluster_annotation_tbl %>%
    filter(gliph_cluster %in% top_cls_vec) %>%
    left_join(cluster_label_map, by = "gliph_cluster") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = annot, values_from = n_cells, values_fill = 0) %>%
    as.data.frame()

  rownames(mat_df) <- mat_df$gliph_cluster_display
  mat_df$gliph_cluster <- NULL
  mat_df$gliph_cluster_display <- NULL
  mat <- as.matrix(mat_df)

  # 2. ADVANCED: Robust Metadata Annotation
  cond_anno <- export_cells %>%
    filter(gliph_cluster %in% top_cls_vec) %>%
    group_by(gliph_cluster_display) %>%
    summarise(dominant_cond = names(which.max(table(condition))), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Normalize data to Title Case (e.g., 'pre' -> 'Pre') to match your preferred legend
  meta_vec <- tools::toTitleCase(tolower(as.character(cond_anno$dominant_cond[match(rownames(mat), cond_anno$gliph_cluster_display)])))

  # Define specific colors but add a fallback for unknown levels
  base_colors <- c("Pre" = "#66c2a5", "Post" = "#fc8d62", "Normal" = "#8da0cb")
  unique_levels <- unique(na.omit(meta_vec))
  
  # Ensure every level has a color assigned
  final_colors <- base_colors[names(base_colors) %in% unique_levels]
  missing_levels <- setdiff(unique_levels, names(base_colors))
  if(length(missing_levels) > 0) {
    extra_cols <- setNames(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(max(3, length(missing_levels)), "Pastel1")[1:length(missing_levels)], missing_levels)
    final_colors <- c(final_colors, extra_cols)
  }

  row_ha = rowAnnotation(
    Clinical_State = meta_vec,
    col = list(Clinical_State = final_colors),
    na_col = "grey50",
    gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 1),
    annotation_legend_param = list(Clinical_State = list(title = "Clinical State"))
  )

  # 3. Render Advanced Heatmap
  ht <- Heatmap(
    mat,
    name = "Cell Count",
    right_annotation = row_ha,
    col = colorRamp2(c(0, max(mat)/2, max(mat)), c("#f7fbff", "#6baed6", "#08306b")),
    cluster_rows = TRUE, 
    cluster_columns = TRUE,
    rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 1),
    column_title = "GLIPH2 Specificity Mapping across T-cell States",
    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"),
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
    column_names_rot = 45
  )

  draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right", padding = unit(c(5, 5, 5, 20), "mm"))
}

```

# sample heatmaps
```{r}
#| label: sample-heatmap
if (isTRUE(params$show_cluster_sample_heatmap) && nrow(cluster_sample_tbl) > 0) {
  top_clusters <- cluster_summary %>%
    filter(n_cells >= params$min_cluster_size_plot) %>%
    slice_head(n = params$top_n_clusters) %>%
    pull(gliph_cluster)

  # mat_df <- cluster_sample_tbl %>%
  #   filter(gliph_cluster %in% top_clusters) %>%
  #   pivot_wider(names_from = sample, values_from = n_cells, values_fill = 0) %>%
  #   as.data.frame()
  # 
  # rownames(mat_df) <- mat_df$gliph_cluster
  # mat_df$gliph_cluster <- NULL
  mat_df <- cluster_sample_tbl %>%
    filter(gliph_cluster %in% top_clusters) %>%
    left_join(cluster_label_map, by = "gliph_cluster") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = sample, values_from = n_cells, values_fill = 0) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  rownames(mat_df) <- mat_df$gliph_cluster_display
  mat_df$gliph_cluster <- NULL
  mat_df$gliph_cluster_display <- NULL

  
  mat <- as.matrix(mat_df)

  ht <- Heatmap(
    mat,
    name = "Cells",
    col = colorRamp2(
      c(0, max(mat, na.rm = TRUE) / 2, max(mat, na.rm = TRUE)),
      c("white", "skyblue", "navy")
    ),
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    cluster_columns = TRUE,
    row_names_side = "left",
    row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 7),
    column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 9),
    column_names_rot = 45,
    column_title = "Sample composition of GLIPH2 clusters",
    heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Cells")
  )
  
  draw(ht, padding = unit(c(5, 5, 5, 20), "mm"))
  

  # ht <- Heatmap(
  #   mat,
  #   name = "Cells",
  #   col = colorRamp2(c(0, max(mat, na.rm = TRUE) / 2, max(mat, na.rm = TRUE)),
  #                    c("white", "skyblue", "navy")),
  #   cluster_rows = TRUE,
  #   cluster_columns = TRUE,
  #   row_names_side = "left",
  #   column_title = "Sample composition of GLIPH2 clusters",
  #   heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Cells")
  # )
  # 
  # draw(ht)
}
```

# cluster-composition-analysis
```{r}
#| label: cluster-composition-analysis
#| fig-width: 16
#| fig-height: 10

if (nrow(cluster_sample_tbl) > 0) {
  # Calculate Publicity: How many patients share each GLIPH2 cluster?
  publicity_df <- export_cells %>%
    filter(!is.na(gliph_cluster)) %>%
    group_by(gliph_cluster_display) %>%
    summarise(
      n_cells = n(),
      n_patients = n_distinct(patient),
      is_public = ifelse(n_patients > 1, "Public (Shared)", "Private (Single Patient)"),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # Normalized stacked bar to visualize sample dominance
  comp_df <- cluster_sample_tbl %>%
    group_by(gliph_cluster) %>%
    mutate(prop = n_cells / sum(n_cells)) %>%
    left_join(cluster_label_map, by = "gliph_cluster") %>%
    filter(gliph_cluster_display %in% (cluster_summary %>% slice_head(n=20) %>% pull(gliph_cluster_display)))

  p_comp <- ggplot(comp_df, aes(x = gliph_cluster_display, y = prop, fill = sample)) +
    geom_col(position = "fill", color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "mako") +
    labs(
      title = "GLIPH2 Cluster Specificity Analysis",
      subtitle = "Normalized composition: identifying sample-dominated vs. public shared clusters",
      x = NULL, y = "Cell Proportion", fill = "Sample"
    ) +
    theme_scratch_pub(params$base_size) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

  print(p_comp)
  save_plot_safe(p_comp, "gliph2_normalized_composition.png", width = 16, height = 10)
}
```

# gliph-fraction-plots
```{r}
#| label: gliph-fraction-plots
plot_frac_by_group <- function(df, group_col, title_txt, filename) {
  tmp <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[group_col]])) %>%
    group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    summarise(
      n_cells = n(),
      n_gliph = sum(!is.na(gliph_cluster)),
      frac_gliph = n_gliph / n_cells,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(n_cells >= params$min_cells_per_group)

  if (nrow(tmp) == 0) return(NULL)

  p <- tmp %>%
    mutate(.group = fct_reorder(.data[[group_col]], frac_gliph)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = .group, y = frac_gliph)) +
    geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    labs(title = title_txt, x = NULL, y = "Cells with GLIPH2 annotation") +
    theme_scratch_pub(params$base_size)

  print(p)
  save_plot_safe(p, filename)
  invisible(p)
}

if (isTRUE(params$show_gliph_by_annotation)) {
  plot_frac_by_group(export_cells %>% rename(group_annot = annot), "group_annot",
                     "Fraction of cells with GLIPH2 annotation by cell state",
                     glue("gliph2_fraction_by_annotation.{params$figure_format}"))
}
if (isTRUE(params$show_gliph_by_sample) && any(!is.na(export_cells$sample))) {
  plot_frac_by_group(export_cells, "sample",
                     "Fraction of cells with GLIPH2 annotation by sample",
                     glue("gliph2_fraction_by_sample.{params$figure_format}"))
}
if (isTRUE(params$show_gliph_by_condition) && any(!is.na(export_cells$condition))) {
  plot_frac_by_group(export_cells, "condition",
                     "Fraction of cells with GLIPH2 annotation by condition",
                     glue("gliph2_fraction_by_condition.{params$figure_format}"))
}
if (isTRUE(params$show_gliph_by_patient) && any(!is.na(export_cells$patient))) {
  plot_frac_by_group(export_cells, "patient",
                     "Fraction of cells with GLIPH2 annotation by patient",
                     glue("gliph2_fraction_by_patient.{params$figure_format}"))
}
```

# tcri-vs-gliph
```{r}
#| label: tcri-vs-gliph

diagnostic_scores <- tibble(
  metric = c(
    "nonNA_tcri_score",
    "nonNA_gliph_score",
    "nonNA_gliph_cluster",
    "overlap_tcri_gliph_score"
  ),
  value = c(
    sum(!is.na(export_cells$tcri_score)),
    sum(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_score)),
    sum(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_cluster)),
    sum(!is.na(export_cells$tcri_score) & !is.na(export_cells$gliph_score))
  )
)

print(diagnostic_scores)


if (isTRUE(params$show_tcri_vs_gliph) && any(!is.na(export_cells$tcri_score)) && any(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_score))) {
  p_assoc <- export_cells %>%
    filter(!is.na(tcri_score), !is.na(gliph_score)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = tcri_score, y = gliph_score)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.1) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "firebrick") +
    labs(
      title = "Association between TCRi and GLIPH2 scores",
      x = "TCRi score",
      y = "GLIPH2 score"
    ) +
    theme_scratch_pub(params$base_size)

  p_assoc
  save_plot_safe(p_assoc, glue("tcri_vs_gliph2.{params$figure_format}"))
}

if (isTRUE(params$show_conga_vs_gliph) && any(!is.na(export_cells$conga_score)) && any(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_score))) {
  p_assoc2 <- export_cells %>%
    filter(!is.na(conga_score), !is.na(gliph_score)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = conga_score, y = gliph_score)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.1) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "firebrick") +
    labs(
      title = "Association between CoNGA and GLIPH2 scores",
      x = "CoNGA score",
      y = "GLIPH2 score"
    ) +
    theme_scratch_pub(params$base_size)

  p_assoc2
  save_plot_safe(p_assoc2, glue("conga_vs_gliph2.{params$figure_format}"))
}
```

# summary-tables-display
```{r}
#| label: summary-tables-display
#| results: asis

if (isTRUE(params$show_summary_tables)) {
  
  # Professional styling using kableExtra
  render_styled <- function(df, cap) {
    print(kableExtra::kbl(df, caption = cap) %>%
      kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")))
  }

  cat("### High-Level Statistics\n")
  render_styled(summary_rollup, "Analysis Rollup")
  cat("\n\n<br>\n\n")

  cat("### Top Significant GLIPH2 Clusters\n")
  render_styled(cluster_summary %>% dplyr::select(gliph_cluster_display, n_cells, frac) %>% head(20), "Top Clusters")
  cat("\n\n<br>\n\n")

  if (nrow(motif_summary) > 0) {
    cat("### Conserved TCR Motifs\n")
    render_styled(motif_summary %>% head(15), "Top Enriched Motifs")
  }
}
```

# Warnings and notes
```{r}
#| label: warnings

condition_missing <- is.null(condition_col_export) || all(is.na(export_cells$condition))
patient_missing   <- is.null(patient_col_export)   || all(is.na(export_cells$patient))
warn_tbl <- tibble(
  warning = c(
    "Few cells with GLIPH2 clusters",
    "Few cells with GLIPH2 patterns",
    "Condition metadata unresolved or empty after export",
    "Patient metadata unresolved or empty after export",
    "No motif table produced"
  ),
  triggered = c(
    mean(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_cluster)) < 0.3,
    mean(!is.na(export_cells$gliph_pattern)) < 0.3,
    condition_missing,
    patient_missing,
    nrow(motif_summary) == 0
  ),
  interpretation = c(
    "Less than 30% of cells in the Seurat object received a GLIPH2 cluster annotation.",
    "Less than 30% of cells received a GLIPH2 pattern annotation.",
    "Condition metadata were present in the input object but were not resolved or retained correctly in the exported GLIPH2 table.",
    "Patient metadata were present in the input object but were not resolved or retained correctly in the exported GLIPH2 table.",
    "Motif-specific reporting was limited because GLIPH2 did not return selected motifs."
  )
) %>%
  filter(triggered)

if (nrow(warn_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No major automatic warnings were triggered under the current GLIPH2 settings.")
} else {
  print(
    kable(
      warn_tbl %>% select(-triggered),
      caption = "Automatically generated GLIPH2 warnings and notes."
    ) %>%
      kable_styling(
        full_width = TRUE,
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")
      )
  )
}
```


# session info
```{r}
#| label: session-info
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), file.path(params$outdir, "sessionInfo.gliph2.txt"))
sessionInfo()
```
